channel.title: Deven Choudhary - Deductions
channel.description: Mechanistic Interpretability Research, Field Notes, and Deductions.

item.title: Understanding Activation Patching in mBERT
item.description:
It is a capital mistake to theorize before one has data. Insensibly one begins to twist facts to suit theories, instead of theories to suit facts.
When attempting to localize the sentiment circuit wi...
